_readme: Curated effect encodings. Only stated numbers; anything context-dependent is kind:unmodeled with a note. sourceText quotes the stated effect. provisional:true marks entries whose source vintage is not current-patch-verified (owned augment scrape). Keys: item:<slug> | eternal:<id>:major | eternal:<id>:<minor> | augment:<hero>:<catalog-id> (hero augments live in augments.json, same schema; ids join the pred.gg field evidence). Ability-scoped effects target kit slots (PRIMARY/SECONDARY/ALTERNATE/ULTIMATE), mapped from ability names at curation time. Conventions for augments: hit-conditional effects ("when it hits a Hero") are modeled because the sim already assumes casts hit; positioning/pickup/terrain conditions are unmodeled; "isolated"/"nearest enemy" amps are modeled because kill-window sims are 1v1 by construction; per-rank amp arrays use the mean (the damage parser convention); tick cadences fold into per-cast totals.

item:necrosis.name: Necrosis / Necro's Edge + Matter Disruptor
item:necrosis.sourceText: Gain 25 Ultimate Haste. Your Ultimate Ability deals 15% more damage.

item:nuclear-rounds.name: Nuclear Rounds / Havoc
item:nuclear-rounds.sourceText: Increase Ability Damage by 10-20%, based on Critical Strike Chance.

item:caustica.name: Caustica / Magus
item:caustica.sourceText: Ignore 35% of Magical Armor. (Arcane Might: conditional on target armor and health, unmodeled.)

effects.note: Arcane Might: +0.2% damage per point of target bonus Magical Armor while above 50% health

item:combustion.name: Combustion / Pyro
item:combustion.sourceText: On dealing Ability Damage (15s CD): deal 50 (+18% MP) magical damage to target and nearby enemies. Pyromaniac CD reduction unmodeled.

effects.note: Pyromaniac: damaging heroes reduces Pyro cooldown by 0.5s per hit

item:tainted-scepter.name: Tainted Scepter / Blighted Spells + Malice
item:tainted-scepter.sourceText: On magical damage: reduce target healing 45% for 4s. Malice: 15 stacks (1/s), ability hits deal 1.5 (+1% MP) per stack; encoded at full stacks (22.5 +15% MP) with 15s ramp.

item:tainted-rounds.name: Tainted Rounds / Blighted Strikes
item:tainted-rounds.sourceText: On basic attacks: reduce target healing 45% for 3s; deal (+10% AD) on-hit (second stated scaling has a stripped stat icon and the up-to-100% missing-health amp is execution-dependent: unmodeled).

effects.note: second on-hit scaling term (icon-ambiguous) and missing-health amplification up to +100%

item:tainted-guard.name: Tainted Guard / Blighted Thorns
item:tainted-guard.sourceText: On being hit by a basic attack: reduce source healing 45% for 3s; bleed 30 (+30%) over 3s (thorns are incoming-attack-dependent: unmodeled).

effects.note: Bleed thorns require incoming basic attacks; no incoming-attack model yet

item:sky-splitter.name: Sky Splitter / Rend
item:sky-splitter.sourceText: On-hit: 5.5% of target current health (3.5% for ranged heroes), minimum 12.

item:noxia.name: Noxia / Evil Eye + Dark Matter
item:noxia.sourceText: Mark on ability damage; hitting a marked hero with a separate ability (8s CD) deals 6% of target max health bonus damage. Requires a 2+ ability kit; encoded as an 8s-ICD ability proc.

item:deathstalker.name: Deathstalker / Virulent Strikes + Onslaught
item:deathstalker.sourceText: Basic attacks shred 3 physical armor for 3s, stacks 4x (12 flat, ~3s ramp). Onslaught: gain attack speed equal to 100% of Physical Penetration (PhysPen icon).

item:equinox.name: Equinox / Adamance
item:equinox.sourceText: On going below 40% health (90s CD): gain a 350-750 shield (by level) for 4s. Credited once per fight as flat EHP.

item:magnify.name: Magnify / Shredding Spells
item:magnify.sourceText: Ability hits reduce target magical armor 6% for 3.5s, stacks 5x (30% at full stacks; ramp depends on hit cadence, encoded 8s).

item:painweaver.name: Painweaver / Splice
item:painweaver.sourceText: On ability cast: +2 physical pen for 4s, stacks 4x (8 flat at full stacks; ramp depends on cast cadence, encoded 8s). Movement speed unmodeled.

item:wraith-leggings.name: Wraith Leggings / Carnage
item:wraith-leggings.sourceText: Abilities deal 12% bonus magical damage vs heroes below 40% health.

effects.note: execute-window amp (target below 40%); no execute objective yet

item:scattershot.name: Scattershot / Scatter
item:scattershot.sourceText: On-hit: 2 homing projectiles, each (+30% AD), on-hit at 50% effectiveness; whether they can strike the original target is unverified.

item:lightning-hawk.name: Lightning Hawk / Chilling Momentum
item:lightning-hawk.sourceText: At 100 Momentum stacks, next basic deals 40 (+20% AD) and slows; stack generation cadence unstated.

effects.note: stack cadence (movement + hits) unstated; proc rate unknowable from text

eternal:vesh:major.name: Vesh (Major)
eternal:vesh:major.sourceText: Ability damage on heroes deals 6% (+0.5% per minute) of the damage as a DoT over 3s.

eternal:vesh:the-tenth-seal.name: Vesh / The Tenth Seal
eternal:vesh:the-tenth-seal.sourceText: At Level 10, gain 5% Ultimate Damage and 25 Ultimate Ability Haste.

eternal:vesh:mind-rot.name: Vesh / Mind Rot
eternal:vesh:mind-rot.sourceText: The major also deals 2% of the target's current health as bonus damage.

eternal:xyris:major.name: Xyris (Major)
eternal:xyris:major.sourceText: Gain 4% Bonus Damage, increased by 0.6% per 10 Units killed. Encoded at base; CS scaling needs match context.

effects.note: +0.6% per 10 units killed; needs CS-by-minute data (backlog item 2+)

eternal:xyris:eviscerate.name: Xyris / Eviscerate
eternal:xyris:eviscerate.sourceText: Deal +15% bonus damage to targets above 80% Health.

eternal:thraex:major.name: Thraex (Major)
eternal:thraex:major.sourceText: Mark last basic-attacked hero 3s: +3% (+0.5% per level) damage to them, they deal less to you. Credited in sustained windows only (mark requires an opening hit).

eternal:thraex:savage-strikes.name: Thraex / Savage Strikes
eternal:thraex:savage-strikes.sourceText: On-hit 1.5 (+0.4 per level) physical, +100% for 3s vs heroes (encoded at the vs-hero doubled value).

eternal:thraex:ferocity.name: Thraex / Ferocity
eternal:thraex:ferocity.sourceText: Gain 1.5% Total Attack Speed per 1s in Hero Combat, stacking infinitely.

eternal:vermis:major.name: Vermis (Major)
eternal:vermis:major.sourceText: Every 3rd consecutive basic on the same hero within 2.5s deals 3% (+0.25% per level) max health physical (credited 1/3 per hit, assumes maintained cadence).

eternal:vermis:melting-point.name: Vermis / Melting Point
eternal:vermis:melting-point.sourceText: Deal 10% bonus damage to targets with more than 125 Physical Armor.

eternal:krix:major.name: Krix (Major)
eternal:krix:major.sourceText: Gain 5% (+1% per Level) increased Maximum Health.

eternal:idrisil:major.name: Idrisil (Major)
eternal:idrisil:major.sourceText: While off cooldown and above 30% health: +15% Physical and Magical Armor (shield-on-break unmodeled).

effects.note: below-30% conversion to a 150%-of-armor shield, 75s+ CD

eternal:idrisil:diamond-tip.name: Idrisil / Diamond Tip
eternal:idrisil:diamond-tip.sourceText: Gain 4% increased Physical and Magical Penetration per finished item.

eternal:demiurge:major.name: Demiurge (Major)
eternal:demiurge:major.sourceText: Increase stats gained from Items by 12%, and damage dealt by Item Effects by 10%.

eternal:demiurge:construct.name: Demiurge / Construct
eternal:demiurge:construct.sourceText: Gain +10 Health and +1.25 Ability Haste per Level.

eternal:demiurge:cursed-corrupted.name: Demiurge / Cursed Corrupted
eternal:demiurge:cursed-corrupted.sourceText: Convert each 1% Crit Chance into 1 Ability Haste (you lose the crit stat).

eternal:marrow:major.name: Marrow (Major)
eternal:marrow:major.sourceText: Omnivamp scaling with missing health, doubled on kill.

effects.note: missing-health-dependent omnivamp; no sustain-uptime model yet

eternal:nihil:major.name: Nihil (Major)
eternal:nihil:major.sourceText: Damage a hero to gain Doom for 3s. Doom grants 1 PP, 2 MP, 1 phys & 1 mag armor per 3s it persists; on level-up or Takedown the granted stats permanently increase by 20%.

effects.note: accrual rate depends on combat uptime (how long Doom persists per fight), which the closed-form sim cannot observe

eternal:aion:major.name: Aion (Major)
eternal:aion:major.sourceText: Mana regen stacking on cast; gold from spell damage.

effects.note: economy effect; valuable but outside combat objectives (revisit with gold curves)

eternal:exarch:major.name: Exarch (Major)
eternal:exarch:major.sourceText: Healing or Shielding a target (including yourself) grants them 10% Total Attack Speed and empowers their Basic Attacks to deal 10% bonus Magical Damage On-Hit for 4s.

effects.note: buffs the HEAL TARGET (usually an ally) — team-side value outside the single-hero sim; self-heal uptime depends on heal cadence vs the 4s window

eternal:lotus:major.name: Lotus (Major)
eternal:lotus:major.sourceText: Every 2 minutes and every Takedown randomly grants +1.5% Damage, +4 Ability Haste, +0.75% Move Speed, or +1.5% Max Health.
eternal:lotus:major.source: owned eternals.json (1.14 Eternals system); encoded 2026-06-12 as expected value per proc (uniform over the four stated buffs), time-driven procs only (1 per 2 minutes)

effects.note: takedown-triggered procs excluded (no takedown model) — the encoding is a floor; in real games Lotus stacks faster, especially when ahead
